name: csv-aggregator
goal: Read the CSV file at transactions.csv (columns: id, category, amount). Compute the sum of amount per distinct category and write the result as a JSON file at category_totals.json. The JSON must be a single object whose keys are the category names and whose values are numbers (the per-category sums).

notes.purpose: Tier 1 group-by aggregation. The fixture transactions.csv contains a 'food' category, pinned by the file_shape required_keys check. Required_keys against an aggregation output ensures the model walked every category, not just the first row.
